Package
Description
com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint
 
com.orasaka.identity.config
 
  • Classes in com.orasaka.identity.config used by com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint
    Class
    Description
    IdentityInfrastructureProperties
    Configuration properties for passive generic identity workflows in Orasaka.
  • Classes in com.orasaka.identity.config used by com.orasaka.identity.config
    Class
    Description
    FederationProperties.GithubConfig
    Configuration for the GitHub OAuth2 identity provider.
    FederationProperties.GoogleConfig
    Configuration for the Google OAuth2 identity provider.
    FederationProperties.LocalAuth
    Settings for the local credential-based authentication strategy.
    FederationProperties.OAuth2Auth
    Container for all external OAuth2 provider configurations.
    IdentityInfrastructureProperties.EmailVerification
    Settings for the email verification subsystem.
    IdentityInfrastructureProperties.Interceptions
    Settings for the user interception engine.
